MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CIMINO, DEAN SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-27-1999 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 501 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON NOV-01-1999 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

RM 501 JAMES MCBRIDE, JUDGE, CLACY, CLERK, SANDRA NAYLOR CSR CAUSE CALLED FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE, ARNOLD EVJE FOR PLAINTIFF, JOSEPH POLITE AND MARY POLITE IN PRO PER FOR DEFENDANT. CASE SETTLED, TERMS ON RECORD AND CLERK'S MINUTES, JUDGMENT SIGNED, TRIAL DATE VACATED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT POLITE, JOSEPH POLITE, MARYANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2911 KEITH STREET, STAYED UNTIL NOV-09-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEF. DOES NOT VACATE, PLF. MAY OBTAIN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR $3613.20. IF DEFS MOVE AS REQUIRED AND SURRENDER POSSESSION AS STATED, PLF. SHALL VACATE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
